LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_CapitalPost.description: A newspaper terminal from the Capital Post offices with archived stories.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_CapitalPost.entries.0.title: Top Stories -- January 11, 2077
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_CapitalPost.entries.1.title: Top Stories -- June 3, 2072
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_CapitalPost.entries.2.title: Top Stories -- July 27, 2052
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_CapitalPost.label: Capital Post - Top Stories Archive
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_HubrisComics.description: Corporate terminal log from Hubris Comics Publishing with release schedules and company announcements.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_HubrisComics.label: Hubris Comics - Company Terminal
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_JeanneMcAndrews.description: Terminal log from Jeanne McAndrews documenting workplace harassment and her responses.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_JeanneMcAndrews.label: L.O.B. Enterprises - Jeanne McAndrews Terminal
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_LOBCEO.description: CEO terminal log from L.O.B. Enterprises with classified weapon invoice.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_LOBCEO.entries.0.title: Saved Invoice
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_LOBCEO.entries.1.title: Company Policies
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_LOBCEO.label: L.O.B. Enterprises - CEO Terminal
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_LOBFrontDesk.description: Front desk terminal log from L.O.B. Enterprises showing emergency protocols and the federal raid.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_LOBFrontDesk.label: L.O.B. Enterprises - Front Desk Terminal
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_LOBResearch.description: Research and development terminal log from L.O.B. Enterprises documenting Project Zhu-Rong weapon prototypes.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_LOBResearch.entries.0.title: Lab Report: Prototype ZRIN-363
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_LOBResearch.entries.1.title: Lab Report: Prototype ZRIN-375
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_LOBResearch.entries.2.title: Lab Report: Prototype ZRIN-401
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_LOBResearch.entries.3.title: Lab Report: Prototype ZRIN-418
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_LOBResearch.label: L.O.B. Enterprises - RD Terminal
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_LOBSecurity.description: Security terminal log from L.O.B. Enterprises with protocols and security system status.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_LOBSecurity.entries.0.title: Security System Status
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_LOBSecurity.entries.1.title: Saved Memo - Attn: Security Captain
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_LOBSecurity.entries.2.title: Company Policies - Emergency Procedures
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_LOBSecurity.entries.3.title: Evacuation Policy T01
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_LOBSecurity.entries.4.title: Inclement Weather Policy C31
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_LOBSecurity.label: L.O.B. Enterprises - Security Operations Terminal
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_MamaDolcesOperations.descri: Operations terminal log from Mama Dolce's Food Distribution plant with diagnostics and corporate memos.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_MamaDolcesOperations.label: Mama Dolce's - Operations Terminal
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_NukaColaMarketing.descripti: Marketing department terminal from the Nuka-Cola plant outlining the Quantum advertising campaign strategy.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_NukaColaMarketing.label: Marketing Terminal - Nuka-Cola Plant
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_NukaColaPackingLine.descrip: Packing line terminal from the Nuka-Cola plant with operator instructions and Quantum bottle weight issues.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_NukaColaPackingLine.label: Packing Line Terminal - Nuka-Cola Plant
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_NukaColaResearch.descriptio: Research department terminal from the Nuka-Cola plant documenting Quantum isotope testing and new product development.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_NukaColaResearch.label: Research Terminal - Nuka-Cola Plant
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_NukaColaShipping.descriptio: Shipping department terminal from the Nuka-Cola plant listing Quantum test site locations in the D.C. area.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_NukaColaShipping.label: Shipping Terminal - Nuka-Cola Plant
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_ReignOfGrelok.description: Beta test terminal for Hubris Comics' text adventure game Reign of Grelok.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_ReignOfGrelok.label: Reign of Grelok - Beta Terminal
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_RobCoMainframe.description: RobCo production mainframe orientation guide for robot protocol operators managing Protectron units.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_RobCoMainframe.label: Robot Master Terminal - RobCo Facility
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_RobotRepairCenter.descripti: Employee terminal from the Robot Repair Center with safety warnings and management memos.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_RobotRepairCenter.entries.1: Note from Management regarding Sector B
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_RobotRepairCenter.label: Desk Terminal - Robot Repair Center
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_SamJohnson.description: Terminal log from Sam Johnson with harassment warnings and emergency protocols.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_SamJohnson.entries.0.title: Emergency Protocols - Weapons Policy H31
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_SamJohnson.entries.1.title: Memo: Sexual Harassment Charge
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_SamJohnson.entries.2.title: Memo: Responding to Federal Raids
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_SamJohnson.label: L.O.B. Enterprises - Sam Johnson's Terminal
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_StatesmanAlfresco.descripti: Restaurant terminal from the Statesman Hotel's Alfresco Lounge with operating hours and staff reminders.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_StatesmanAlfresco.label: Alfresco Lounge Terminal - Statesman Hotel
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_StatesmanConcierge.descript: Hotel concierge terminal with guest incident and complaint reports.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_StatesmanConcierge.label: Concierge Terminal - Statesman Hotel
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_ChengComputer.description: Communist propaganda terminal from Comrade Cheng's suite promoting unification under Chinese leadership.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_ChengComputer.label: Cheng Personal Computer - Tenpenny Tower
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_CitadelLab.description: Brotherhood of Steel laboratory terminal with research notes, tactical assessments, and announcements.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_CitadelLab.entries.0.title: AVF Problem
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_CitadelLab.entries.1.title: Leaky Hydraulics
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_CitadelLab.entries.2.title: Enclave Tactical Assessment
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_CitadelLab.entries.3.title: GNR Battle Report
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_CitadelLab.entries.4.title: General Robot Diagnostics
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_CitadelLab.entries.5.title: Reddin Funeral
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_CitadelLab.label: Citadel Lab Terminal
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_CitadelMedical.description: Brotherhood of Steel medical records and casualty reports.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_CitadelMedical.label: Citadel Medical Terminal
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_ConfessorCromwell.descripti: Confessor Cromwell's terminal from the Children of Atom building in Megaton with religious teachings.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_ConfessorCromwell.label: Confessor Cromwell's Terminal - Megaton
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_ElderLyons.description: Personal terminal entries from Elder Owyn Lyons regarding Squire Maxson and family matters.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_ElderLyons.entries.0.title: Squire Maxson - Progress Report
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_ElderLyons.entries.1.title: Sarah's Birthday
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_ElderLyons.entries.2.title: Safe Unlock Command
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_ElderLyons.label: Elder Lyons' Terminal
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_EnclaveCraterCamp.descripti: Enclave field operations terminal log from Crater Camp with crater exploration mission briefing.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_EnclaveCraterCamp.label: Enclave Field Research - Crater Camp
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_EnclaveOlney.description: Enclave field operations terminal log from Old Olney outpost with deathclaw mission orders.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_EnclaveOlney.label: Enclave Field Research - Old Olney
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_EnclaveRhoCamp.description: Enclave field operations terminal log from Camp RHO with RHO Chip experimental defense system instructions.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_EnclaveRhoCamp.label: Enclave Field Research - Camp RHO
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_EnclaveRobotRepair.descript: Enclave peacekeeping operations terminal log with weapon inventory and transient census from robot repair center outpost.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_EnclaveRobotRepair.label: Enclave Peacekeeping - Robot Repair Outpost
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_EnclaveSilo.description: Enclave field operations terminal log with creature analysis from silo outpost near Springvale.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_EnclaveSilo.entries.0.title: Field Entry: Bloatfly
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_EnclaveSilo.entries.1.title: Field Entry: Brahmin
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_EnclaveSilo.entries.2.title: Field Entry: Giant Ant
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_EnclaveSilo.label: Enclave Field Research - Silo Outpost
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_EnclaveSpringvale.descripti: Enclave field operations terminal log with creature analysis from Springvale power plant outpost.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_EnclaveSpringvale.label: Enclave Field Research - Springvale
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_EnclaveTemple.description: Enclave field operations terminal log with creature research and mission orders from Temple of the Union outpost.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_EnclaveTemple.label: Enclave Field Research - Temple Outpost
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_FortIndependenceReports.des: Brotherhood Outcasts terminal log with field reports from Protector Casdin and Defender Rockfowl.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_LibertyPrime.description: A terminal containing pre-war Liberty Prime project records and post-war Brotherhood diagnostics.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_LibertyPrime.entries.2.titl: Dr. Bloomfeld Letter to Gen. Chase
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_LibertyPrime.label: Liberty Prime Operation Terminal
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_MamaDolcesEncrypted.descrip: Decrypted terminal log revealing Mama Dolce's as a Chinese espionage front operation.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_MamaDolcesEncrypted.label: Mama Dolce's - Encrypted Communications
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_MaxsonArchive.description: Brotherhood of Steel archives containing Roger Maxson's diary and family lineage records.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_MaxsonArchive.label: Maxson Archive Terminal
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_RavenRockDelivery.descripti: Enclave delivery terminal from Raven Rock Level 1B documenting deathclaw specimen transport to bio-lab.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_RavenRockDelivery.label: Delivery Terminal - Raven Rock
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_ResearchEnclaveArmor.descri: Brotherhood Outcasts research terminal log analyzing captured Enclave armor radiation resistance.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_ResearchEnclaveArmor.label: Research Note - Enclave Armor
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_ResearchLaser.description: Brotherhood Outcasts research terminal log analyzing laser weapon technology and maintenance.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_ResearchLaser.label: Research Note - Laser Rifle/Pistol
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_ResearchMinigun.description: Brotherhood Outcasts research terminal log analyzing minigun ballistic weapon systems.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_ResearchMinigun.label: Research Note - Minigun
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_ResearchMissileLauncher.des: Brotherhood Outcasts research terminal log documenting failed missile launcher accuracy modification attempts.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_ResearchPlasma.description: Brotherhood Outcasts research terminal log analyzing plasma weapon technology and toroid mechanics.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_ResearchPlasma.label: Research Note - Plasma Rifle
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_ResearchPulseGrenade.descri: Brotherhood Outcasts research terminal log analyzing pulse grenade anti-robotic weaponry.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_ResearchPulseGrenade.label: Research Note - Pulse Grenade
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_SpringvaleSchool.descriptio: Raider leader's journal from Springvale school documenting operations and plans to breach Vault 101.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_SpringvaleSchool.label: Raider Journal - Springvale School
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_SquireMaxson.description: Personal terminal entries from Squire Arthur Maxson, including diary entries and stories.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_SquireMaxson.label: Squire Maxson's Terminal
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Vault101DeskTerminal.descri: Security Chief's confidential terminal with plans for dealing with rebel elements in Vault 101.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Vault101DeskTerminal.label: Security Desk Terminal - Vault 101
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Vault101Medical.description: Vault 101 clinic medical terminal with confidential patient files and experimental research logs.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Vault101Medical.label: Medical Data System - Vault 101
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Vault101Overseer.descriptio: Vault 101 Overseer's personal terminal with security dossiers, scouting reports, and official Vault-Tec instructions.
Vault-Tec Instructions - Letter from Dr. Braun
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Vault101Overseer.label: Overseer's Terminal - Vault 101
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Vault106Hallucination.descr: Vault 106 resident terminal showing effects of psychoactive gas exposure through increasingly erratic personal logs.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Vault106Hallucination.label: Resident Terminal - Vault 106
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Vault106Overseer.descriptio: Vault 106 Overseer's terminal documenting preparations for psychoactive gas release experiment.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Vault106Overseer.label: Overseer's Terminal - Vault 106
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Vault106Security.descriptio: Vault 106 security terminal with urgent notices regarding air filtration irregularities and Control Sequence release protocols.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Vault106Security.label: Security Terminal - Vault 106
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Vault112Command.description: Vault 112 auxiliary command terminal with Dr. Braun's simulation logs and failsafe program documentation.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Vault112Command.label: Auxiliary Command - Vault 112
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Vault87ChiefPhysician.descr: Vault 87 Chief Physician terminal documenting Dr. Wayne Merrick's FEV experiments on vault residents in the Evolutionary Experimentation Program.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Vault87ChiefPhysician.label: Chief Physician's Terminal - Vault 87
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Vault87Engineering.descript: Vault 87 engineering section terminal with maintenance logs from Daniel Koster revealing suspicious power draws and a desperate hidden message.
Service Issue Entry V87-007 - NEED HELP
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Vault87Engineering.label: Engineering Terminal - Vault 87
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Vault87LabTech.description: Vault 87 laboratory terminal with notices regarding radiation safety protocols and termination procedures for EEP test subjects.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Vault87LabTech.label: Lab Technician Terminal - Vault 87
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Vault87Medical.description: Vault 87 medical records terminal listing 93 deceased residents, 87 coded as Unexplained/Undefined deaths from the EEP experiments.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Vault87Medical.label: Medical Records - Vault 87
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Vault87Overseer.description: Vault 87 Overseer's terminal with security dossiers, mission reports, and official Vault-Tec instructions regarding the FEV experiments and GECK.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Vault87Overseer.entries.4.t: Vault-Tec Instructions - Letter from Dr. Braun
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Vault87Overseer.label: Overseer's Terminal - Vault 87
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Vault87Stevens.description: Personal journal entries from Vault 87 Technician Peter Stevens documenting his mental breakdown after the disappearance of his son.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Vault87Stevens.label: Personal Journal - Peter Stevens
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Vault92Engineering.descript: Vault 92 engineering terminal with maintenance trouble tickets revealing infrastructure issues and section 4 security upgrades.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Vault92Engineering.label: Engineering Logs - Vault 92
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Vault92Laboratory.descripti: Vault 92 laboratory terminal from Professor John Malleus documenting white noise experiment failures and desperate pleas to the Overseer.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Vault92Laboratory.label: Laboratory Terminal - Vault 92
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Vault92Overseer.description: Vault 92 Overseer Richard Rubin's terminal documenting the White Noise Mind Suggestion Combat Experimentation that drove residents insane.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Vault92Overseer.label: Overseer's Terminal - Vault 92
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Vault92Studio.description: Vault 92 studio supervisor terminal from Parker Livingsteen noticing audio signal anomalies and documenting inappropriate relationships.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Vault92Studio.label: Studio Computer - Vault 92
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Vault92SupplyShop.descripti: Vault 92 supply shop terminal from Gordie Sumner with requests about headphones, pudding supplies, and a suspicious weapon deal.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Vault92SupplyShop.label: Trading Post Terminal - Vault 92
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Vault92Zoe.description: Vault 92 violinist Zoe Hammerstein's personal diary showing progressive mental deterioration from white noise exposure.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Vault92Zoe.entries.0.title: Zoe's Thoughts
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Vault92Zoe.entries.1.title: More of Zoe's Thoughts
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Vault92Zoe.entries.2.title: morre of Zoes Thoughts
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Vault92Zoe.label: Personal Diary - Zoe Hammerstein
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_VaultTecDatabase.descriptio: A Vault-Tec terminal log from the Pentagon Library containing classified vault experiment data.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_VaultTecDatabase.label: Vault-Tec Terminal Log - Database
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_VaultTecHQEmployee.descript: Vault-Tec Corporate Headquarters employee terminal with important bulletins and security procedures from Washington D.C.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_VaultTecHQEmployee.label: Employee Terminal - Vault-Tec HQ
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_VaultTecHQSystemOp.descript: Vault-Tec Corporate Headquarters system operation terminal with security notices and administrative bulletins. Three stations exist throughout Administration.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_VaultTecHQSystemOp.label: System Operation Terminal - Vault-Tec HQ
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_WaterDistribution.descripti: Official Brotherhood of Steel water distribution mission reports and resource logs.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_WaterDistribution.label: Jefferson Memorial - Water Distribution Records
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_WeaponInfo.description: Brotherhood of Steel weapon research database with technical specifications.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_WeaponInfo.entries.0.title: N99 10mm Pistol
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_WeaponInfo.entries.1.title: R91 Assault Rifle
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_WeaponInfo.entries.2.title: AEP7 Laser Pistol
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_WeaponInfo.entries.3.title: AER9 Laser Rifle
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_WeaponInfo.label: Weapon Information Terminal
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_ArchivesAdmin.description: Administrative terminal from the National Archives with notices about exhibits, security, and facility management.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_ArchivesAdmin.label: Administrator Berkeley's Terminal - National Archives
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_ArchivesPrizes.description: Prize redemption terminal from the National Archives offering Med-Tek Fruit Mentats products.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_ArchivesPrizes.label: Prize Redemption Terminal - National Archives
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_ArchivesProtectrons.descrip: Robotics control terminals from the National Archives managing Declaration of Independence reenactment Protectrons.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_ArchivesProtectrons.label: Protectron Bay Terminals - National Archives
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_ArchivesQuiz.description: Interactive quiz terminal from the National Archives testing knowledge of the Declaration of Independence with prize vouchers.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_ArchivesQuiz.label: National Archives - Guess And Win!
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_DCTATenpenny.description: Metro transit authority emergency terminal with containment door controls and espionage act warnings.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_DCTATenpenny.label: DCTA Emergency Access - Tenpenny Tower
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_DeltaNineRocket.description: Interactive exhibit terminal for the Delta IX Rocket display at the Museum of Technology.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_DeltaNineRocket.label: Delta IX Rocket Terminal - Museum of Technology
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_GermantownImpound.descripti: Pre-war police terminal log with vehicle impound case files.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_GermantownImpound.label: Germantown Police - Impound Records
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_GermantownLockdown.descript: Corrupted police terminal log with emergency cell release commands.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_GermantownLockdown.label: Germantown Police - Lockdown Terminal Log
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_GermantownNineOneOne.descri: Pre-war 911 emergency call recordings from Germantown Police headquarters.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_GermantownNineOneOne.label: Germantown Police - 911 Call Logs
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_GermantownPoliceStation.des: Corrupted police terminal log with contraband storage access.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_HopeHospital.description: Medical injury report terminal from Our Lady of Hope Hospital documenting unusual patient cases.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_HopeHospital.label: Injury Reports - Our Lady of Hope Hospital
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_MDCTAService.description: A Metro D.C. Transit Authority service terminal log with system failure warnings.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_MDCTAService.label: MDCTA Service Terminal Log - Gas/Water Reservoir
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_MuseumInfo.description: Public information terminal from the Museum of Technology with exhibit guides and event schedules.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_MuseumInfo.entries.0.title: Transportation Exhibits
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_MuseumInfo.entries.1.title: Robotics Exhibits
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_MuseumInfo.entries.2.title: Flight Exhibits
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_MuseumInfo.entries.3.title: Spaceflight Exhibits
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_MuseumInfo.entries.4.title: Vault-Tec's Vault of Tomorrow
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_MuseumInfo.entries.5.title: West Tek Power Armor Demo
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_MuseumInfo.entries.6.title: Lecture: Oppenheimer's Folly?
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_MuseumInfo.entries.7.title: Planetarium Schedule
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_MuseumInfo.entries.8.title: GigantoMax Theater Schedule
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_MuseumInfo.label: Museum Information Terminal - Museum of Technology
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_MuseumMaintenance.descripti: Maintenance department terminal from the Museum of Technology with bulletins from Derek Remmings.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_MuseumMaintenance.label: Museum Maintenance Terminal - Museum of Technology
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_MuseumResearchLead.descript: Terminal from B. Bell, Research Lead at the Museum of Technology, with log entries about exhibits and operations.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_MuseumResearchLead.label: Research Lead's Terminal - Museum of Technology
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_MuseumSecurity.description: Security terminal from the Museum of Technology with bulletins from Lead Curator Donald Cohen.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_MuseumSecurity.label: Museum Security Terminal - Museum of Technology
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_MuseumTurrets.description: RobCo trespasser management terminal from the Museum of Technology security system.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_MuseumTurrets.label: Turret Control System - Museum of Technology
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_NCRA_Germantown.description: National Catastrophe Relief Auxiliary terminal log from Nancy Kroydon documenting the aftermath of nuclear war.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_NCRA_Germantown.label: NCRA Response Unit MD-478 - Germantown
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_PentagonLibrary.description: Classified military reports from the Pentagon Library archives.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_PentagonLibrary.label: Pentagon Library - Classified Reports
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_SatComNW05a.description: Military satellite control terminal with logs documenting attempts to locate and activate USDOD orbital weapons platform.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_SatComNW05a.entries.0.title: Log entry 001
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_SatComNW05a.entries.1.title: Log entry 002
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_SatComNW05a.entries.2.title: Log entry 003
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_SatComNW05a.entries.3.title: Log entry 004
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_SatComNW05a.entries.4.title: Log entry 005
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_SatComNW05a.entries.5.title: Log entry 006
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_SatComNW05a.entries.6.title: Satellite Control Terminal
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_SatComNW05a.label: Satellite Terminal - SatCom Array NW-05a
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_SpaceFacts.description: Educational terminal from the Museum of Technology with fascinating space facts.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_SpaceFacts.entries.0.title: Space Fact 1
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_SpaceFacts.entries.1.title: Space Fact 2
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_SpaceFacts.entries.2.title: Space Fact 3
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_SpaceFacts.entries.3.title: Space Fact 4
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_SpaceFacts.entries.4.title: Space Fact 5
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_SpaceFacts.entries.5.title: Space Fact 6
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_SpaceFacts.entries.6.title: Space Fact 7
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_SpaceFacts.entries.7.title: Space Fact 8
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_SpaceFacts.label: Far Out Space Facts - Museum of Technology
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_UrbanPlanningWorkstation.de: Dysfunctional HR management system workstation from the DC Metro Office of Urban Planning showing bureaucratic absurdity.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_AbrahamWashington.descripti: Private expedition notes from Abraham Washington documenting recovery efforts for historical artifacts.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_AbrahamWashington.label: Abraham Washington's Terminal - Rivet City
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_AhzrukhalTerminal.descripti: Ahzrukhal's personal notes about his customers and business operations at The Ninth Circle.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_AhzrukhalTerminal.label: Terminal - The Ninth Circle
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Bannon.description: Council member Bannon's terminal with business dealings and political correspondence.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Bannon.entries.0.title: Council Meeting Notes
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Bannon.entries.1.title: Marketplace Inventory
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Bannon.entries.2.title: Vera's Performance Review
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Bannon.label: Bannon's Terminal - Rivet City
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_BrassLantern.description: Andy Stahl's terminal from The Brass Lantern in Megaton tracking inventory and his brother Leo's problems.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_BrassLantern.label: Brass Lantern Terminal - Megaton
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_CapitalPreservation.descrip: Museum information terminal from the Capital Preservation Society with descriptions of historical American documents.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_CapitalPreservation.entries: U.S. Declaration of War on Germany
U.S. Declaration of War on China
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_CapitalPreservation.label: Capital Preservation Society - Rivet City
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Hacked.description: A RobCo terminal entry from Bethesda Office ruins showing security reprogramming.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Hacked.entries.0.title: User Log
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Hacked.label: Hacked Terminal Log
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_MerestiSecurity.description: Security terminal from Meresti trainyard station with access controls and security protocols.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_MerestiSecurity.label: Meresti Trainyard - Security Terminal
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Moriarty.description: Colin Moriarty's personal terminal from his saloon in Megaton with dirt on residents and visitors.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Moriarty.entries.0.title: Residents - Jericho
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Moriarty.entries.1.title: Residents - Leo Stahl
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Moriarty.entries.2.title: Residents - Andy Stahl
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Moriarty.entries.3.title: Residents - Billy Creel
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Moriarty.entries.4.title: Residents - Doc Church
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Moriarty.entries.5.title: Visitors - Mr. Burke
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Moriarty.entries.6.title: Visitors - James (Vault 101)
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Moriarty.entries.7.title: Tab
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Moriarty.label: Moriarty's Terminal - Megaton
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_RangersOuter.description: Security terminal from Reilly's Rangers compound with a notice from Canterbury search party.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_RangersOuter.label: Outer Terminal - Ranger Compound
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_ReillysTerminal.description: Command terminal from Reilly's Rangers with personnel records, active contracts, and Reilly's personal mission logs.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_ReillysTerminal.label: Reilly's Terminal - Ranger Compound
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_RivetCityClinic.description: Medical records terminal from the Rivet City clinic with patient treatment logs.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_RivetCityClinic.label: Patient Data System - Rivet City Clinic
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_RivetCitySecurity.descripti: Security access terminals throughout Rivet City with shift reports and incident logs.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_RivetCitySecurity.label: Security Terminals - Rivet City
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_TheFamily.description: Terminal from The Family's meeting area in Meresti Metro station documenting their laws and rules.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_TheFamily.entries.0.title: The First Law
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_TheFamily.entries.1.title: The Second Law
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_TheFamily.entries.2.title: The Third Law
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_TheFamily.entries.3.title: The Fourth Law
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_TheFamily.entries.4.title: The Fifth Law
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_TheFamily.entries.5.title: Feeding Grounds
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_TheFamily.entries.6.title: Regarding the Arefu Incident
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_TheFamily.label: The Family's Terminal - Meresti Metro
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Vance.description: Terminal from Vance's living quarters in Meresti Metro station with vampire folklore research.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Vance.entries.0.title: Vampires Defined
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Vance.entries.1.title: Daytime Fear
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Vance.entries.2.title: Vampires Destruction
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Vance.label: Vance's Terminal - Meresti Metro
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_WeatherlyHotel.description: Weatherly Hotel registry terminal with guest records and management notes.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_WeatherlyHotel.label: Weatherly Hotel Terminal - Rivet City
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_WinthropTerminal.descriptio: Winthrop's maintenance notes on Underworld's failing electrical infrastructure.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_WinthropTerminal.label: Winthrop's Terminal - Underworld
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_AnchorageMemorial.descripti: A terminal entry from Anchorage Memorial with a hidden stash location.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_AnchorageMemorial.label: Anchorage Memorial - Hidden Message
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_BarrowsResearch.description: Doctor Barrows' comprehensive research on post-necrotic human biology and ghoul mutations.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_BarrowsResearch.label: Research Terminal - The Chop Shop
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_BigsleyPersonalLog.descript: Private diary entries from Scribe Bigsley documenting his mental decline during the water distribution mission.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_BigsleyPersonalLog.label: Jefferson Memorial - Scribe Bigsley's Personal Log
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_DashwoodDatabase.descriptio: Herbert Dashwood's personal database documenting his adventures, companions, and discoveries across the Capital Wasteland.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_DashwoodDatabase.label: Exploration Database - Tenpenny Tower
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_DoctorLesko.description: Doctor Lesko's personal terminal from his office in Marigold metro station documenting his genetic research on giant ants.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_DoctorLesko.entries.0.title: Where did I go wrong?
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_DoctorLesko.entries.1.title: Sample location discovered!
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_DoctorLesko.entries.2.title: Dangers
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_DoctorLesko.label: Doctor Lesko's Terminal - Marigold Station
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_DoctorLi.description: Personal terminal from Doctor Madison Li documenting hydroponics research progress and council meeting records.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_DoctorLi.entries.0.title: Hydroponics Progress
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_DoctorLi.label: Doctor Li's Terminal - Rivet City
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_DunwichTrapped.description: A desperate journal entry from a survivor trapped in the Dunwich Building.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_DunwichTrapped.label: Dunwich Building - Trapped Survivor
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_EliseWalton.description: Final terminal entry from Elise Walton, a CPA at the GAO, written as the bombs fell on October 23, 2077.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_EliseWalton.entries.0.title: Final Entry
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_EliseWalton.label: Elise Walton's Terminal - Falls Church
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_HamiltonHideaway.descriptio: Personal terminal log from Hamilton's family shelter documenting survival after the Great War.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_HamiltonHideaway.label: Hamilton Hideaway - Shelter Log
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_HermanGranger.description: A terminal with auto-dictation software showing pre-war corporate messages and disturbing post-war entries.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_HermanGranger.label: Herman Granger's Terminal Log - Dunwich Building
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_HilltopFarm.description: Shared community terminal log from Hilltop Farm documenting post-war farm life and survival.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_HilltopFarm.entries.0.title: Entry: Edgar
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_HilltopFarm.entries.1.title: Entry: Rochelle
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_HilltopFarm.entries.2.title: Entry: Tyrone
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_HilltopFarm.entries.3.title: Entry: Doc J
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_HilltopFarm.entries.4.title: Entry: Tyler
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_HilltopFarm.entries.5.title: Entry: Tyler
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_HilltopFarm.entries.6.title: Entry: Jim
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_HilltopFarm.entries.7.title: Entry: Edgar
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_HilltopFarm.entries.8.title: Entry: Jim
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_HilltopFarm.label: Hilltop Farm - Community Log
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_IrradiatedPool.description: Scientific field journal documenting behavioral research on feral ghouls at an irradiated pool site.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_IrradiatedPool.label: Irradiated Pool - Research Log
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_LeskoHatchery.description: Doctor Lesko's portable computer terminal from the queen ant's hatchery in Marigold station with experimental controls.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_LeskoHatchery.label: Doctor Lesko's Portacomp - Hatchery Control
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_MoiraBrownLog.description: A terminal entry from Moira Brown's research logs at Craterside Supply.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_MoiraBrownLog.label: Moira's Research Terminal Log - Megaton
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Pinkerton.description: Private computer from Doctor Pinkerton with Rivet City founding records and android experiment logs.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Pinkerton.entries.0.title: City Founders Log
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Pinkerton.entries.1.title: Android Log 1
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Pinkerton.entries.2.title: Android Log 2
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Pinkerton.entries.3.title: Android Log 3
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_Pinkerton.label: Pinkerton's Computer - Rivet City
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_RedRacerSurgeon.description: Diary entries from a rogue surgeon at Red Racer factory documenting control chip experiments on ghouls and super mutants.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_RedRacerSurgeon.label: Surgeon's Terminals - Red Racer Factory
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_RyanBriggs.description: Research journal from Ryan Brigg documenting his experiments to make molerat meat edible while masquerading as a raider.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_RyanBriggs.entries.0.title: Attempt 86
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_RyanBriggs.entries.1.title: Attempt 87
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_RyanBriggs.entries.2.title: Attempt 171
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_RyanBriggs.entries.3.title: Attempt 172
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_RyanBriggs.entries.4.title: Attempt 173 - Final Entry
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_RyanBriggs.label: Jury Street Tunnels - Ryan Brigg's Journal
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_SeagraveHolmes.description: Personal terminal from Seagrave Holmes with weapon design ideas and political correspondence with Doctor Li.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_SeagraveHolmes.label: Seagrave Holmes' Terminal - Rivet City
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_TulipTerminal.description: Tulip's personal project transcribing Paradise Lost from pre-war literature.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_TulipTerminal.label: Word Processing System - Underworld Outfitters
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_WBrandice.description: W. Brandice's terminal log from Grayditch chronicling his family's struggle against fire ants and his past with the Enclave.
LanguageData.FCP_Holotape_WBrandice.label: W. Brandice's Terminal Log - Grayditch
